completed_tasks.name: Platform route audit + panel error states

remaining_tasks.name: Housekeeping fixes (console→Pino, scheduler lifecycle, dead code, UTF-8, worker exit)

decisions.decision: ForbiddenError must be re-thrown by all getAdmin* wrappers in lib/api.ts
decisions.rationale: Wrappers were swallowing it as generic Error, breaking instanceof check in page catch blocks

decisions.decision: AdminJidResolvedWorkerEvent added to WorkerEvent union in service.ts
decisions.rationale: Agent used cast workaround without updating the discriminated union, causing TS2367 in Docker build

next_action: Execute plan 03-04: run /gsd-execute-phase for the housekeeping fixes (console.* → Pino logger, scheduler lifecycle, dead code deletion, UTF-8 fix, worker exit handler). Plan is at .planning/phases/03-admin-identity-service/03-04-PLAN.md.
context_notes: Wave 1 (03-01) and Wave 2 (03-02, 03-03) complete. Wave 3 (03-04) not started — session ended before executing. Two post-execution bugs were fixed in prior sessions: TS2367 in service.ts WorkerEvent union (03-02) and ForbiddenError swallowing in getAdmin* wrappers (03-03). Plan 03-04 is purely housekeeping with no new features.
